exact.Claude Code 中文速查表，面向中文开发者整理的快捷键、斜杠命令、CLI: Claude Code cheat sheet for Chinese-speaking developers, covering shortcuts, slash commands, CLI flags, MCP, memory, skills, agents, and environment variables.
